violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2025

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top rolling cart) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2025
The draw cooler and low boy behind the register were observed not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025
The grout in the back prep are and tile in the back prep area were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

Back-up water observed in bathrooms; water observed on backroom floors. Per PIC and staff, bathrooms back-up and cause water overflow in bathrooms, mop sink area, and through floor drains. Inspector observed water back-up in those locations at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024
The condensate from the tank in mop room is draining onto the floor. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were added at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

The ice machine is lacking a air gap. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2024
The (grout on the floor) in the (Kitchen) area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024
